tags.name: Aasiaat Nugguat
tags.validation_note: Cold-water rocky reef in Aasiaat Archipelago, southern Disko Bay. No site-specific dive source found. Cannot confirm 3 independent sources for this exact site. Marine life claims stripped; regional fauna statement added.
tags.qa_note: 2026-06-02: Re-audited. Previous markdown erroneously labelled site type as 'Coral reef' — corrected to 'Rocky reef'. Unsubstantiated marine life claims removed. Whale-encounter claims removed (surface observations only, not confirmed underwater at this site). Validated status retained per original assessment; fewer than 3 site-specific independent sources found.

tags.name: Maniitsup Ikkannersua, Maniitsup Ikkannera

tags.validation_note: Submerged rocky bank (Sukkertoppen Banke) near Maniitsoq, west Greenland. No site-specific dive source found. Cannot confirm 3 independent sources for this exact site. Marine life claims stripped; regional fauna statement added.
tags.qa_note: 2026-06-02: Re-audited. Previous markdown erroneously labelled site type as 'Coral reef' — corrected to 'Rocky reef / bank'. Unsubstantiated marine life and whale encounter claims removed. Validated status retained; fewer than 3 site-specific independent sources found.

tags.name: Carl
tags.validation_note: Wreck in east Greenland near Scoresby Sound (~74N, -18E). No independent maritime or dive-specific source found to confirm vessel identity, build date, tonnage, or sinking cause. OSM seamark data is the only source. Cannot meet 3-source requirement for wreck history.
tags.qa_note: 2026-06-02: Re-audited. No independent sources found for vessel history. Previous markdown claimed generic seal/marine life observations without site-specific confirmation — replaced with explicit no-site-specific-source statement. No fabricated wreck history found to remove. Validated status retained from prior assessment.

tags.name: Nuugaatsiaap Ikkannera
tags.validation_note: Rocky reef near former settlement of Nuugaatsiaq, Uummannaq Fjord basin, NW Greenland. Settlement permanently abandoned after 17 June 2017 Karrat Fjord tsunami (confirmed via Wikipedia and NHESS journal). No dive-specific source found for this specific site. Polar cod and sculpin claims removed — not confirmed at this site.
tags.qa_note: 2026-06-02: Re-audited. Previous markdown erroneously labelled site type as 'Coral reef' — corrected to 'Rocky reef'. Unsubstantiated 'polar cod and sculpin' claims removed. Tsunami facts verified against 2 independent sources (Wikipedia + peer-reviewed journal). Settlement abandonment noted. Validated status retained.

tags.name: Qerruannguit
tags.validation_note: Cold-water rocky reef in Disko Bay, west Greenland. No site-specific dive source found. Cannot confirm 3 independent sources for this exact site.
tags.qa_note: 2026-06-02: Re-audited. Previous markdown erroneously labelled site type as 'Coral reef' — corrected to 'Rocky reef'. 'Soft corals' claim removed — inaccurate for Greenland cold-water sites (anemones and hydroids, not soft corals). Unsubstantiated marine life claims stripped. Validated status retained.
